## Key Requirements

> **Convention: Inline Clarification Markers**
> Use `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION: brief description]` inline next to any requirement that is ambiguous, incomplete, or has multiple valid interpretations. Max 5 markers per document. All markers MUST be resolved (via user input) before `/ct` can proceed to technical decomposition. Do not collect ambiguities in a separate section — keep them inline where they occur.
